local I=table.insert local return(function(q,b,F,Z,D,S,w,k,T,f,Q,d,m,V,Y,M,v,p,K,h,o,O,J)f,m,V,J,Y,Q,K,d,k,h,o,p,v,T,O,M=function(q,I)local b=K(I)local F=function(F,Z,D)return Q(q,{F;Z;D},I,b)end return F end,function(q,I)local b=K(I)local F=function()return Q(q,{},I,b)end return F end,function(q,I)local b=K(I)local F=function(F)return Q(q,{F},I,b)end return F end,function(q,I)local b=K(I)local F=function(F,Z,D,S)return
